                   })

+                @Reusable
+                @Component
+                struct SendMessageItem {
+                  @State mmsItem: mmsListType = {} as mmsListType
+                  @State index: number = 0
+                  @State needRefreshTime: boolean = false
+                  @State textDirection: string = 'ltr'
+                  @State currentScreenWidth: number = 0

+                  @State isScrolling: boolean = false
+                  @State isSendingAnimate: boolean = false
+                  @State scrollEndIndex: number = 0
+                  @State scrollStartIndex: number = 0
+                  @State isTouch: boolean = false

+                  @State mConversationCtrl: ConversationController = new ConversationController()
+                  @State delConversionController: CustomDialogController | null = null
+                  @State controller: TextInputController = new TextInputController()
+                  @State resendDialogController: CustomDialogController = {} as CustomDialogController
+                  @State isResendRcsInfo: boolean = false
+                  @State resendStateIsRcs: boolean = false
+                  @State isOsAccountConstraintEnabled: boolean = false
+                  onSendFailedButtonClick: () => void = () => {}
+                  onBubbleClick: () => void = () => {}
+                  changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: () => void = () => {}
+                  changeFocusAble: () => void = () => {}
+
+                  aboutToReuse(params: Record<string, ESObject>) {
+                    this.mmsItem = params.mmsItem as mmsListType
+                    this.index = params.index as number
+                    this.needRefreshTime = params.needRefreshTime as boolean
+                    this.textDirection = params.textDirection as string
+                    this.currentScreenWidth = params.currentScreenWidth as number
+                    this.isPermissionDenied = params.isPermissionDenied as boolean
+                    this.isScrolling = params.isScrolling as boolean
+                    this.isSendingAnimate = params.isSendingAnimate as boolean
+                    this.scrollEndIndex = params.scrollEndIndex as number
+                    this.scrollStartIndex = params.scrollStartIndex as number
+                    this.isTouch = params.isTouch as boolean
+                    this.showMMContentPicker = params.showMMContentPicker as boolean
+                    this.mConversationCtrl = params.mConversationCtrl as ConversationController
+                    this.delConversionController = params.delConversionController as CustomDialogController | null
+                    this.controller = params.controller as TextInputController
+                    this.resendDialogController = params.resendDialogController as CustomDialogController
+                    this.isResendRcsInfo = params.isResendRcsInfo as boolean
+                    this.resendStateIsRcs = params.resendStateIsRcs as boolean
+                    this.isOsAccountConstraintEnabled = params.isOsAccountConstraintEnabled as boolean
+                    this.onSendFailedButtonClick = params.onSendFailedButtonClick as () => void
+                    this.onBubbleClick = params.onBubbleClick as () => void
+                    this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool = params.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool as () => void
+                    this.changeFocusAble = params.changeFocusAble as () => void
+                  }
+
+                  build() {
+                    Flex({
+                      justifyContent: FlexAlign.Center,
+                      alignItems: ItemAlign.Start
+                    }) {
+                      Column() {
+                        Row() {
+                          if (this.mmsItem.sendStatus == commonData.int.RCS_SEND_CANCELED ||
+                            (this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum == 1 &&
+                              this.mmsItem.sendStatus == commonData.int.SEND_MESSAGE_FAILED) ||
+                            (this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum > 1 &&
+                              this.mmsItem.failuresNumber > 0 &&
+                              this.mmsItem.completeNumber ==
+                              this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum)) {
+                            SendFailedButton({
+                              mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                              contactsNum: this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum,
+                              onSendFailedButtonClick: this.onSendFailedButtonClick
+                            }).margin({ end: LengthMetrics.vp(8) })
+                          }
+                          Column() {
+                            if (this.mmsItem.isMsm) {
+                              MmsContent({
+                                isTouch: this.isTouch,
+                                conversationCtrl: this.mConversationCtrl,
+                                mmsInfo: this.mmsItem,
+                                item: this.mmsItem.mmsSource,
+                                contentType: this.mmsItem.contentType,
+                                bubbleTextDirection: 'right',
+                                itemIndex: this.index,
+                                delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                                showMMContentPicker: this.showMMContentPicker,
+                                content: this.mmsItem.content,
+                                mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                                scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                                scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                                changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                                mmsContentBackgroundColor: $r('app.color.brand'),
+                              }).id('mms_content_right_id')
+                            }
+                            if (!this.mmsItem.isMsm || (this.mmsItem.msgTitle && this.mmsItem.content == '') ||
+                                (this.mmsItem.isMsm &&
+                                  this.mmsItem.content !== ''&&  
+                                  this.mmsItem.msgShowType !== common.MESSAGE_SHOW_TYPE.MAP &&
+                                  !MmsUtil.isSlideType(this.mmsItem.contentType))) {
+                              BubbleText({
+                                conversationCtrl: this.mConversationCtrl,
+                                bubbleTextBorderRadius: [2, 16],
+                                bubbleTextDirection: 'right',
+                                content: this.mmsItem.content,
+                                detectResContent: this.mmsItem.detectResContent,
+                                isRcs: this.mmsItem.isRcs,
+                                bubbleTextBackgroundColor: $r('app.color.brand'),
+                                itemIndex: this.index,
+                                mmsItem: this.mmsItem,
+                                delConversionController: this.delConversionController,
+                                showMMContentPicker: this.showMMContentPicker,
+                                currentScreenWidth: this.currentScreenWidth,
+                                isMsm: this.mmsItem.isMsm,
+                                controller: this.controller,
+                                isPermissionDenied: this.isPermissionDenied,
+                                isScrolling: this.isScrolling,
+                                isGeometryAnimate: this.isSendingAnimate,
+                                scrollEndIndex: this.scrollEndIndex,
+                                scrollStartIndex: this.scrollStartIndex,
+                                isLastItem: this.index == this.mConversationCtrl.mmsList.length - 1,
+                                changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool: this.changeConversationSelectedNumberAndCheckAllBool,
+                                smsType: this.mConversationCtrl.smsType,
+                                changeFocusAble: this.changeFocusAble
+                              })
+                            }
+                          }
+                          .accessibilityLevel('no')
+                          .id(this.mmsItem.id.toString())
+                          .alignItems(HorizontalAlign.End)
+                          .onClick(this.onBubbleClick)
+                        }
+                        .justifyContent(FlexAlign.End)
+                        .alignItems(VerticalAlign.Center)
+                        Flex({
+                          alignItems: ItemAlign.Center,
+                          justifyContent: FlexAlign.End,
+                          space: {
+                            main: LengthMetrics.vp(4)
+                          }
+                        }) {
+                          if (this.mConversationCtrl.contactsNum > 1 && !this.mmsItem.isMsm) {
+                            Text($r('app.string.msg_detail_mms'))
+                              .fontSize(10)
+                              .lineHeight(13)
+                              .fontColor($r('sys.color.font_emphasize'))
+                              .margin(this.textDirection === 'rtl' ?
+                                { top: 8 } :
+                                { top: 8 })
+                              .onClick(() => {
+                                HiLog.i(TAG, 'onClick to GroupDetail')
+                                this.mConversationCtrl.pushToGroupDetail(this.index);
+                              })
+                              .accessibilityLevel('yes')
+                          }
+                          if (this.mmsItem.sendStatus !=
+                          common.int.SEND_MESSAGE_SENDING) {
+                            Text(this.needRefreshTime ? this.mmsItem.detailTime : this.mmsItem.detailTime)
+                              .textAlign(TextAlign.Start)
+                              .lineHeight(13)
+                              .fontSize(10)
+                          }
+                        }
+                      }
+                    }
+                  }
+                }
+

model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/conversationlis:
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/conversationlist/conversationList.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/conversationlist/conversationList.ets
@@ -1,5 +1,85 @@
 // ... existing imports ...
 
+@Reusable
+@Component
+struct ConversationListItemComponent {
+  @State item: messageType = {} as messageType
+  @State mIsMultipleSelectState: boolean = false
+  @State currentHasReadIndex: number = -1
+  @State isShowHeadIcon: boolean = false
+  @State isShowFromCheckAll: boolean = false
+  @State inputText: string = ''
+  @State listShowMenu: boolean = false
+  @State isPad: boolean = false
+  @State curBp: string = ''
+  @State sessionListHeight: number = 0
+  @State showSelectState: boolean = false
+  @State isLastItem: boolean = false
+  @State index: number = 0
